language.rule: guild language selects Turkish or English for active Training/Tryout announcements, controls and lifecycle replies

channelReduction.previousIssue: Many small categories and duplicate guide/log channels made it difficult to find the correct system.

community.target: community, Fima support, applications and events without clan/ranking channels

clan.target: clan boards, challenge, training/tryout, support and one private staff area

tsbtr.target: ranking, challenge, training/tryout, support and one private staff area

safety.reason: The compact schema is ready, but an existing lab must be backed up and rebuilt through the test-guild-only typed-confirmation gate before old channels are removed.

nextLiveStep: Deploy the guarded v5 smoke to repost Turkish Training/Tryout panels and refresh the compact-board evidence. A physical test-lab channel cleanup remains gated by the test-guild rebuild confirmation.
